headline: Does US$2.8 Billion in AI Cloud Deals with Tech Giants Change The Bull Case For IREN (IREN)?
summary: In July 2026, IREN Limited announced it had secured US$2.80 billion in new multi-year AI cloud services contracts with customers including Microsoft, NVIDIA, and several AI developers, lifting its 2026 AI Cloud annualized run-rate revenue target to more than US$4.00 billion, about 85% of which is now under contract.
